title: The letter arrives
description: A forgotten letter surfaces in an attic box. The handwriting belongs to someone the protagonist believed dead for twenty years.

title: The storm breaks
description: A coastal village loses power during the worst storm in a century. Two strangers shelter in the same lighthouse.

title: The offer
description: An anonymous patron offers to fund the protagonist's art exhibition — but only if they destroy their most personal piece.

title: The map fragment
description: A torn map found in a secondhand book leads to coordinates in the middle of a desert. Someone has already been digging there.

title: The inheritance clause
description: A distant relative's will includes one peculiar condition: the heir must live in the crumbling estate for exactly one year before claiming it.
